positive: A stylized, whimsical nocturnal forest scene, designed for apparel print. The central focus is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, interwoven vines. The background features silhouetted, stylized fauna—such as a fox, an owl, and butterflies—perched on curved branches. Use a minimalist, line-art aesthetic combined with watercolor washes of deep indigo, emerald green, and glowing cyan. The composition must be centrally balanced, featuring strong negative space around the edges for print versatility. High contrast, clean silhouettes, and a slightly magical, enchanting mood. Vector art quality, ink on fabric.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, low resolution, disfigured, blurry edges, grainy, overly complex, photo-realistic, bokeh
